name: 3. Deep Learning With TensorFlow Keras (O'Reilly) - MNIST CNN
description: A convolutional neural network with data augmentation built with TensorFlow/Keras, extending Network 2 with 56x56 upscaled images, random rotation, translation, and zoom to improve generalisation.
architecture: 56×56×1 → Augmentation → Conv(64,3×3) → MaxPool → Conv(64,3×3) → MaxPool → Flatten → Dense(128, relu) → Dropout(0.15) → Dense(128, relu) → Dropout(0.15) → Dense(10, softmax)

results.summary: ~98.7% test accuracy on 10,000 unseen images with a train/test gap of ~-1.0%. Aggressive data augmentation on 56×56 upscaled images forces the model to learn position/scale-invariant features. Training was halted by EarlyStopping.
